title: A Commission-supplied MCP server is dialed and enumerated on agent_started
description: When the Commission carries an inline mcp_servers entry, the agent dials it at startup and records it on agent_started.data.avp.mcp_servers with its id and terminal status. Asserted with $contains so other (agent-default) servers don't matter. Uses the repo's bundled stdio test MCP server via the ${AVP_TEST_MCP} fixture token (the harness expands it to an absolute path).

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.

events.label: agent_started lists the connected MCP server
